temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a person in a dark, moody setting. The person, wearing a light-colored suit jacket, sits at a table with their hands clasped in front of them. A black briefcase rests on the table before them. The lighting is dim and has a cool, blueish tint. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The audio begins with the solid, heavy thud of a briefcase being placed on a surface, followed by the distinct click of its latch opening. The camera angle shifts to a high-angle, close-up view inside the now-open briefcase. A rectangular, white box with a black insert sits in the center of the dark interior. The same watermark remains in the top right corner. A hand enters the frame from the left and picks up the white box, revealing the empty space in the case. The hand then places the box back down. A male voice then speaks in a calm, direct, and slightly questioning tone, asking in Mandarin, "你们有录像机吗?" (Do you have a video recorder?). The shot tightens again on the hand placing the white box down. Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen, reading, "你们有录像机吗?". The hand then moves away, leaving the box in the center of the frame. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right.
